__rationale__: Triggering fixture for MR-55: methylation-aware restriction-enzyme planning. Construct describes an XbaI digest planned on plasmid DNA prepared from a dam+ host (DH5alpha); XbaI is dam-blocked at GATC-overlapping sites, so the digest will fail. Expected eventual outcome (Phase 5/6 executable): HARD block; v0.2 stub returns INFO.

construct.notes: T-414 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage for MR-55. Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations (digest plan vs host.methylation_phenotype cross-check).
